title: Projet Mobilite Plateau Consultation Methodology v3
body: Projet Mobilite Plateau Consultation Methodology v3. Version 3 authored by Ruth Armstrong reviewed by Jean Francois Lavigne published 2026-09-24 workspace Service de urbanisme et de la mobilite. Purpose describes the reconciled methodology for the final consultation cycle April 6 2026 through October 15 2026. Corridors In Scope. Rue Saint Denis protected bike lane segment. Boulevard Saint Laurent north pedestrian priority zone review. Avenue du Mont Royal transit stop redesign. Rue Rachel bike corridor extension. Corridors Out of Scope. Rue Saint Joseph pilot removed from final consultation scope at cross departmental review on 2026-09-24 deferred to a separate feasibility track. Language Access. Acknowledges Bengali Urdu Arabic Vietnamese Spanish French English cohorts. Bengali and Urdu outreach must be verified against delivery logs before publishing reach claims. Delivery Channels. Portal intercept survey community meeting sign in SMS reply in and email form. Reach Weighting. Method uses language cohort weighted response counts. Denominator is delivered messages not attempted. Where delivery adjusted sample per cohort is below 60 the reach conclusion stays open. Change Log v2 to v3 Rue Saint Joseph pilot removed from scope.

title: Corridors In Scope Overview
body: Rue Saint Denis Boulevard Saint Laurent north Avenue du Mont Royal and Rue Rachel form the four corridor scope for the final consultation.

title: Corridors Out of Scope Rue Saint Joseph pilot deferred
body: Rue Saint Joseph pilot deferred to feasibility track after cross departmental review 2026-09-24. Not part of the final consultation methodology.

title: Reach Weighting Method
body: Delivery adjusted denominator described in narrative. Under sixty per cohort keep conclusion open.

title: Consultation Cycle Timeline
body: April 6 2026 launch. Wave 1 community meetings May and June. Advisory committee midpoint July. Delivery window audit August. Methodology cross department review September 15. Version 3 published September 24. Final public consultation October 15 2026 at 7 PM Centre communautaire du Plateau.
